mapper.select: select id as "qaId", question, answer, case when question ILIKE #{keyword} ESCAPE '\' then 1.0 when similar_questions ILIKE #{keyword} ESCAPE '\' then 0.9 when answer ILIKE #{keyword} ESCAPE '\' then 0.7 else 0.5 end as score, 'keyword' as source from kb_qa where status = 'published' and ( question ILIKE #{keyword} ESCAPE '\' or coalesce(similar_questions, '') ILIKE #{keyword} ESCAPE '\' or answer ILIKE #{keyword} ESCAPE '\' ) order by score desc, id desc limit #{topK}
